nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the `risingwave_connector` crate declaring its dependencies on Kafka, Kinesis, Pulsar, Redis, S3, and many other connector-related libraries along with feature flags.

nodes.name: with_options_connection.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML schema defining all WITH options accepted when creating connection objects in RisingWave, including Kafka, Kinesis, and other external system connection parameters.

nodes.name: with_options_sink.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive YAML schema enumerating all WITH options for sink connectors (Kafka, Kinesis, Iceberg, JDBC, Redis, etc.), used for documentation generation and validation.

nodes.name: with_options_source.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive YAML schema enumerating all WITH options for source connectors (Kafka, Kinesis, Pulsar, MySQL CDC, PostgreSQL CDC, etc.), used for documentation generation and validation.
